NOTE: Do NOT manually edit this file. This file is automatically updated when semantic release (release.yml) runs. Manually editing this file can break your releases and break third party tools that use this file.

patches.name: Auto reward ads
patches.description: When a rewarded ad is closed, the game always thinks you watched the entire ad. You get the reward even if you skip or close the ad immediately.

patches.name: Free in-app purchases
patches.description: When you try to buy something, the purchase is immediately marked as successful without contacting Google Play. The EA Nimble MTX system receives a null error (success) and grants the item.

patches.name: Free in-app purchases
patches.description: Skips Google Play Billing and credits IAP items (gem packs, coin packs, starter packs) directly. Lets the original failure path run after crediting to close the Contacting screen naturally. Also disables the startup purchase-restore flow.

patches.name: Free reward ads
patches.description: When the game tries to show a rewarded ad, it immediately fires the ad-clicked and ad-closed callbacks without actually showing the ad. You get the reward instantly.

patches.name: Remove ads
patches.description: Prevents video ads from loading. When the game tries to load an ad, nothing happens. Ads will not be shown.

patches.name: Universal SharedPreferences injector
patches.description: Injects SharedPreferences values into the app at runtime. Configure via the 'prefs-data' option with format: file:type:key:value,file2:type2:key2:value2. Supported types: int, boolean, string, long, float.

options.title: SharedPreferences data
options.description: Comma-separated list of prefs to inject. Format: file:type:key:value,file2:type2:key2:value2. Types: int, boolean, string, long, float. Example: game_prefs:int:coins:99999,game_prefs:boolean:premium:true

patches.name: Universal billing bypass
patches.description: Patches Google Play In-App Billing classes to simulate successful purchases.

patches.name: Universal disable ad components
patches.description: Disables ad-related activities, receivers, and services in AndroidManifest.xml.

patches.name: Universal offline mode
patches.description: Makes the app think it has no internet connection by patching network-checking methods.

patches.name: Universal remove ads
patches.description: Scans the target APK for common ad SDK classes and patches their ad-loading methods to do nothing.

patches.name: Universal remove license verification
patches.description: Patches Google Play License Verification Library (LVL) classes to always return licensed.

patches.name: Universal signature bypass
patches.description: Bypasses signature verification by injecting a Proxy of IPackageManager that returns the original APK signatures. Also spoofs getInstallerPackageName to return 'com.android.vending'. Provide the original signatures via the 'signatures-base64' option (from 'apksigner verify --print-certs'). Equivalent to Lucky Patcher's 'Signature verification killer' (sigkill.dex).

options.title: Original signatures (Base64)
options.description: Base64-encoded original APK signatures. If empty, only installer package name is spoofed. Format: 1 byte count + (4 byte length + signature bytes) for each cert.

patches.name: Unlimited gems, rubies & unlock all
patches.description: Sets gems, rubies (diamonds), keys and tickets to 9999999. Unlocks VIP (removes ads + VIP rewards + Ninja Assassin VIP character), all assassin characters (2-44), including all Legendary characters (Scarecrow, Dracula, Thor, Wolverine, Myers, Santa, Grinch, Nutcracker, Cricket Player), and all special knives.

patches.name: Unlock premium
patches.description: Unlocks all premium-gated features (Advanced Solver / Kociemba, custom color schemes, VIP support, no relaunch screens). Returns true from PremiumHelper.hasActivePurchase() so the entire app behaves as if a premium subscription is active.
